name: autoux
description: AutoUX — Autonomous UI Design Optimization for Claude Code. Applies Karpathy's autoresearch ratchet loop to visual UI/UX improvement using LLM-as-Judge evaluation with Playwright MCP screenshots.

plugins.name: autoux
plugins.description: Autonomous UI design optimizer: /autoux:auto runs zero-config enterprise-grade improvement. Also includes /autoux:svg (generate SVGs from text), /autoux (configurable loop), /autoux:plan (setup wizard), /autoux:review (one-shot design review), and /autoux:compare (A/B comparison). Uses multi-dimensional LLM-as-Judge panel with Playwright MCP screenshots — no external APIs.
